title: ervum unijugum
intro: Ervum unijugum, also known as Indian hyacinth or wild bean, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the legume family. It is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Ervum unijugum include relief from fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Ervum unijugum is often prepared as a herbal tea or decoction to harness its medicinal properties, or it may be used in combination with other herbs in traditional Ayurvedic and Unani medicine.
